SELECT p0."Name", c."Name" AS "Category", COALESCE(sum(o."Quantity"), 0)::int AS "UnitsSold", COALESCE(sum(o."UnitPrice" * o."Quantity"::numeric), 0.0) AS "Revenue"
FROM order_items AS o
INNER JOIN orders AS o0 ON o."OrderId" = o0."Id"
INNER JOIN product_variants AS p ON o."VariantId" = p."Id"

SELECT p1."Id", p1."CategoryId", p1."CreatedAt", p1."Description", p1."Name", p1."Status", p1."VendorId", v."Id", v."ApprovedAt", v."Description", v."GSTNumber", v."IsActive", v."LogoUrl", v."PANNumber", v."Status", v."StoreEmail", v."StoreName", v."UserId", c."Id", c."Name", c."ParentId", c."isActive", c.slug, s."Id", s."AvailableValues", s."IsActive", s."IsDefault", s."Price", s."ProductId", s."ReservedStockQty", s."StockQty", s."Id0", s."ImageOrder", s."ImageUrl", s."VariantId"
FROM (
    SELECT p."Id", p."CategoryId", p."CreatedAt", p."Description", p."Name", p."Status", p."VendorId", (
        SELECT min(p0."Price")
        FROM product_variants AS p0
        WHERE p."Id" = p0."ProductId" AND p0."IsActive") AS c
    FROM products AS p
    WHERE p."Status" = 'Active'
    ORDER BY (
        SELECT min(p0."Price")
        FROM product_variants AS p0
        WHERE p."Id" = p0."ProductId" AND p0."IsActive") DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS p1
INNER JOIN vendors AS v ON p1."VendorId" = v."Id"
INNER JOIN categories AS c ON p1."CategoryId" = c."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p2."Id", p2."AvailableValues", p2."IsActive", p2."IsDefault", p2."Price", p2."ProductId", p2."ReservedStockQty", p2."StockQty", p3."Id" AS "Id0", p3."ImageOrder", p3."ImageUrl", p3."VariantId"
    FROM product_variants AS p2
    LEFT JOIN product_images AS p3 ON p2."Id" = p3."VariantId"
) AS s ON p1."Id" = s."ProductId"
ORDER BY p1.c DESC, p1."Id", v."Id", c."Id", s."Id"

2026-06-24 16:19:22.989 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (16ms) [Parameters=[@p1='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT p2."Id", p2."CategoryId", p2."CreatedAt", p2."Description", p2."Name", p2."Status", p2."VendorId", v."Id", v."ApprovedAt", v."Description", v."GSTNumber", v."IsActive", v."LogoUrl", v."PANNumber", v."Status", v."StoreEmail", v."StoreName", v."UserId", c."Id", c."Name", c."ParentId", c."isActive", c.slug, s."Id", s."AvailableValues", s."IsActive", s."IsDefault", s."Price", s."ProductId", s."ReservedStockQty", s."StockQty", s."Id0", s."ImageOrder", s."ImageUrl", s."VariantId"
FROM (
    SELECT p."Id", p."CategoryId", p."CreatedAt", p."Description", p."Name", p."Status", p."VendorId", (
        SELECT min(p1."Price")
        FROM product_variants AS p1
        WHERE p."Id" = p1."ProductId" AND p1."IsActive") AS c
    FROM products AS p
    WHERE p."Status" = 'Active' AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM product_variants AS p0
        WHERE p."Id" = p0."ProductId" AND p0."IsDefault")
    ORDER BY (
        SELECT min(p1."Price")
        FROM product_variants AS p1
        WHERE p."Id" = p1."ProductId" AND p1."IsActive") DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS p2
INNER JOIN vendors AS v ON p2."VendorId" = v."Id"
INNER JOIN categories AS c ON p2."CategoryId" = c."Id"
LEFT JOIN (

SELECT p0."Name", c."Name" AS "Category", COALESCE(sum(o."Quantity"), 0)::int AS "UnitsSold", COALESCE(sum(o."UnitPrice" * o."Quantity"::numeric), 0.0) AS "Revenue"
FROM order_items AS o
INNER JOIN orders AS o0 ON o."OrderId" = o0."Id"
INNER JOIN product_variants AS p ON o."VariantId" = p."Id"
INNER JOIN products AS p0 ON p."ProductId" = p0."Id"
INNER JOIN categories AS c ON p0."CategoryId" = c."Id"
WHERE o0."PlacedAt" >= @startDate AND o0."PlacedAt" <= @endDate AND o0."OrderPaymentStatus" = 'Paid'
GROUP BY p0."Id", p0."Name", c."Name"

SELECT p0."Name", c."Name" AS "Category", COALESCE(sum(o."Quantity"), 0)::int AS "UnitsSold", COALESCE(sum(o."UnitPrice" * o."Quantity"::numeric), 0.0) AS "Revenue"
FROM order_items AS o
INNER JOIN orders AS o0 ON o."OrderId" = o0."Id"
INNER JOIN product_variants AS p ON o."VariantId" = p."Id"
INNER JOIN products AS p0 ON p."ProductId" = p0."Id"
INNER JOIN categories AS c ON p0."CategoryId" = c."Id"
WHERE o0."PlacedAt" >= @startDate AND o0."PlacedAt" <= @endDate AND o0."OrderPaymentStatus" = 'Paid'
GROUP BY p0."Id", p0."Name", c."Name"
ORDER BY COALESCE(sum(o."Quantity"), 0)::int DESC
LIMIT @p

SELECT c."Name" AS "Category", count(DISTINCT o."OrderId")::int AS "Count"
FROM order_items AS o
INNER JOIN orders AS o0 ON o."OrderId" = o0."Id"
INNER JOIN product_variants AS p ON o."VariantId" = p."Id"
INNER JOIN products AS p0 ON p."ProductId" = p0."Id"
INNER JOIN categories AS c ON p0."CategoryId" = c."Id"
WHERE o0."PlacedAt" >= @startDate AND o0."PlacedAt" <= @endDate

ORDER BY count(DISTINCT o."OrderId")::int DESC

SELECT c."Name" AS "Category", count(DISTINCT o."OrderId")::int AS "Count"
FROM order_items AS o
INNER JOIN orders AS o0 ON o."OrderId" = o0."Id"
INNER JOIN product_variants AS p ON o."VariantId" = p."Id"
INNER JOIN products AS p0 ON p."ProductId" = p0."Id"
INNER JOIN categories AS c ON p0."CategoryId" = c."Id"
WHERE o0."PlacedAt" >= @startDate AND o0."PlacedAt" <= @endDate
GROUP BY c."Name"
ORDER BY count(DISTINCT o."OrderId")::int DESC

INNER JOIN orders AS o0 ON o."OrderId" = o0."Id"
INNER JOIN vendors AS v ON o."VendorId" = v."Id"
WHERE o0."PlacedAt" >= @startDate AND o0."PlacedAt" <= @endDate AND o0."OrderPaymentStatus" = 'Paid'
GROUP BY v."StoreName"
ORDER BY COALESCE(sum(o."Quantity"::numeric * o."UnitPrice"), 0.0) DESC
LIMIT @p

FROM order_items AS o

INNER JOIN vendors AS v ON o."VendorId" = v."Id"

WHERE o."DiscountId" IS NOT NULL AND o."OrderPaymentStatus" = 'Paid'
GROUP BY d."Code"
ORDER BY COALESCE(sum(o."DiscountAmount"), 0.0) DESC
LIMIT @p

SELECT v."StoreName", COALESCE(sum(o."Quantity"::numeric * o."UnitPrice"), 0.0) AS "Revenue"
FROM order_items AS o
INNER JOIN orders AS o0 ON o."OrderId" = o0."Id"
INNER JOIN vendors AS v ON o."VendorId" = v."Id"
WHERE o0."PlacedAt" >= @startDate AND o0."PlacedAt" <= @endDate AND o0."OrderPaymentStatus" = 'Paid'
GROUP BY v."StoreName"
ORDER BY COALESCE(sum(o."Quantity"::numeric * o."UnitPrice"), 0.0) DESC
LIMIT @p

SELECT c."Name" AS "Category", count(DISTINCT o."OrderId")::int AS "Count"
FROM order_items AS o
INNER JOIN orders AS o0 ON o."OrderId" = o0."Id"
INNER JOIN product_variants AS p ON o."VariantId" = p."Id"
INNER JOIN products AS p0 ON p."ProductId" = p0."Id"
INNER JOIN categories AS c ON p0."CategoryId" = c."Id"
WHERE o0."PlacedAt" >= @startDate AND o0."PlacedAt" <= @endDate
GROUP BY c."Name"

SELECT p0."Name", c."Name" AS "Category", COALESCE(sum(o."Quantity"), 0)::int AS "UnitsSold", COALESCE(sum(o."UnitPrice" * o."Quantity"::numeric), 0.0) AS "Revenue"
FROM order_items AS o
INNER JOIN orders AS o0 ON o."OrderId" = o0."Id"
INNER JOIN product_variants AS p ON o."VariantId" = p."Id"
INNER JOIN products AS p0 ON p."ProductId" = p0."Id"
INNER JOIN categories AS c ON p0."CategoryId" = c."Id"
WHERE o0."PlacedAt" >= @startDate AND o0."PlacedAt" <= @endDate AND o0."OrderPaymentStatus" = 'Paid'
GROUP BY p0."Id", p0."Name", c."Name"
ORDER BY COALESCE(sum(o."Quantity"), 0)::int DESC
LIMIT @p

2026-06-24 21:28:48.719 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (13ms) [Parameters=[@startDate='?' (DbType = DateTime), @endDate='?' (DbType = DateTime), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT p0."Name", c."Name" AS "Category", COALESCE(sum(o."Quantity"), 0)::int AS "UnitsSold", COALESCE(sum(o."UnitPrice" * o."Quantity"::numeric), 0.0) AS "Revenue"
FROM order_items AS o
INNER JOIN orders AS o0 ON o."OrderId" = o0."Id"
INNER JOIN product_variants AS p ON o."VariantId" = p."Id"
INNER JOIN products AS p0 ON p."ProductId" = p0."Id"
INNER JOIN categories AS c ON p0."CategoryId" = c."Id"
WHERE o0."PlacedAt" >= @startDate AND o0."PlacedAt" <= @endDate AND o0."OrderPaymentStatus" = 'Paid'
GROUP BY p0."Id", p0."Name", c."Name"

SELECT c."Name" AS "Category", count(DISTINCT o."OrderId")::int AS "Count"
FROM order_items AS o
INNER JOIN orders AS o0 ON o."OrderId" = o0."Id"
INNER JOIN product_variants AS p ON o."VariantId" = p."Id"
INNER JOIN products AS p0 ON p."ProductId" = p0."Id"
INNER JOIN categories AS c ON p0."CategoryId" = c."Id"
WHERE o0."PlacedAt" >= @startDate AND o0."PlacedAt" <= @endDate
GROUP BY c."Name"
ORDER BY count(DISTINCT o."OrderId")::int DESC

SELECT v."StoreName", COALESCE(sum(o."Quantity"::numeric * o."UnitPrice"), 0.0) AS "Revenue"
FROM order_items AS o
INNER JOIN orders AS o0 ON o."OrderId" = o0."Id"
INNER JOIN vendors AS v ON o."VendorId" = v."Id"
WHERE o0."PlacedAt" >= @startDate AND o0."PlacedAt" <= @endDate AND o0."OrderPaymentStatus" = 'Paid'
GROUP BY v."StoreName"

    SELECT o."Id", o."DiscountAmount", o."DiscountId", o."OrderPaymentStatus", o."PaymentId", o."PlacedAt", o."PlatformCommission", o."ShippingAmount", o."Status", o."StripePaymentIntentId", o."Subtotal", o."TaxAmount", o."Total", o."UserAddressId", o."UserId"
    FROM orders AS o
    ORDER BY o."PlacedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS o0
INNER JOIN users AS u ON o0."UserId" = u."Id"
ORDER BY o0."PlacedAt" DESC

SELECT d."Code", COALESCE(sum(o."DiscountAmount"), 0.0) AS "Amount"
FROM orders AS o
LEFT JOIN discounts AS d ON o."DiscountId" = d."Id"
WHERE o."DiscountId" IS NOT NULL AND o."OrderPaymentStatus" = 'Paid'
GROUP BY d."Code"
ORDER BY COALESCE(sum(o."DiscountAmount"), 0.0) DESC
LIMIT @p

SELECT p0."Name", c."Name" AS "Category", COALESCE(sum(o."Quantity"), 0)::int AS "UnitsSold", COALESCE(sum(o."UnitPrice" * o."Quantity"::numeric), 0.0) AS "Revenue"

SELECT v."StoreName", COALESCE(sum(o."Quantity"::numeric * o."UnitPrice"), 0.0) AS "Revenue"
FROM order_items AS o
INNER JOIN orders AS o0 ON o."OrderId" = o0."Id"
INNER JOIN vendors AS v ON o."VendorId" = v."Id"
WHERE o0."PlacedAt" >= @startDate AND o0."PlacedAt" <= @endDate AND o0."OrderPaymentStatus" = 'Paid'
GROUP BY v."StoreName"
ORDER BY COALESCE(sum(o."Quantity"::numeric * o."UnitPrice"), 0.0) DESC
LIMIT @p
